criteria.name: AI Personalization
criteria.description: The degree to which the app uses AI to personalize the user experience, including workout plans, diet recommendations, and mental health support.

criteria.name: Adaptability
criteria.description: The ability of the app to adapt to the user's progress, fitness level, and goals over time.

criteria.name: Variety of Features
criteria.description: The range of features offered by the app, including workout tracking, nutritional guidance, mental health support, and integration with other devices.

criteria.name: User Reviews & Ratings
criteria.description: Overall user satisfaction based on app store reviews and ratings.

criteria.name: AI Technology Used
criteria.description: The types of AI technologies employed, including Machine learning, Natural language processing, Deep learning and Computer vision.
